name: lesson_plan
kpi: Ensure clear alignment with course syllabus and curriculum mapping
Verify support for cognitive, affective, and practical learning domains
Confirm progressive difficulty level using Bloom's Taxonomy
Check for problem-based learning and interactive engagement opportunities
instruction: Analyze the uploaded lesson plan. Compare it against the module baseline. Ensure the weekly topics align with the syllabus, assess if teaching activities support the stated learning domains, and verify a progressive difficulty structure. Look for opportunities to improve interactive or problem-based learning.
